app.name: Poin Pajak Jakarta
app.tagline: Scan receipts. Support Jakarta. Win prizes.

landing.empty_body: Scan the QR on any Jakarta tax receipt to claim your first points.

claim.title: Claim your points
claim.already_body: You claimed {{points}} points from this receipt on {{date}}.
claim.error_body: The QR code looks invalid or outdated. Try scanning again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.reset_confirm_body: This will clear your account, claim history, and reset your balance to zero. This can't be undone.

register_cta.title: Your chance to win a Wuling Air EV
register_cta.subtitle: Register free to enter the quarterly grand-prize draw — plus weekly voucher draws.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Bapenda DKI Jakarta needs your name and phone to enter you in the draws and deliver prizes.
register.subtitle_edit: Update the name and phone we use for prize draws.
register.phone_hint: We'll contact you here if you win.
register.error_phone: Please enter a valid mobile number.
register.privacy: Your details stay on this device and are only used to notify winners.

raffle.grand_prize_subtitle: One winner every quarter, drawn from all Jakarta taxpayers.

scan_cta.title: Scan every tax receipt
scan_cta.subtitle: Each receipt you scan verifies Jakarta's tax records, earns you points, and counts as 1 entry in the draw.
scan_cta.step_1_body: Find the QR at the bottom of any Jakarta restaurant, hotel, or parking receipt.
scan_cta.step_2_body: Point it at the QR. Tap the link that appears.
scan_cta.step_3_body: Points land instantly — and you get another raffle entry.
